summary_one_line: Input must place the 4-byte FOURCC magic 'sPLT' as a chunk-type field so chunk_name == png_sPLT holds

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A chunk-type field equal to the 4-byte ASCII FOURCC 'sPLT' (0x73 0x50 0x4c 0x54) at a chunk-name offset, so the equality test chunk_name == png_sPLT takes the true branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: cmplog winning seeds reach line 229 with the true side resolved (T=48) and dispatch png_handle_sPLT; the BYTE DIFF shows the winner producing the sPLT FOURCC bytes (0x73 's', 0x50 'P', 0x4c 'L', 0x54 'T') at offsets 0x35/0x1a/0x1b/0x1c that the loser never holds.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive seeds keep chunk-name bytes at unrelated values and resolve T=0 at line 229, never matching the exact 4-byte sPLT magic.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog intercepts the chunk_name == png_sPLT integer compare, logs both operands, and I2SRandReplace substitutes the constant operand (png_sPLT FOURCC) into the input bytes that matched the other operand, instantly satisfying the exact 4-byte equality that random havoc cannot brute-force.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A chunk-type field whose bytes progressively approach the 4-byte sPLT FOURCC, ultimately matching it exactly so chunk_name == png_sPLT is true.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the true branch in 10/10 trials (avg duration 5.50h vs loser 24.00h), driven by CMP_MAP prefix-distance feedback that preserves each input whose chunk_name operand is closer to png_sPLT than any prior input, climbing the gradient to the exact match.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive lacks the CMP_MAP distance feedback, gets no signal for partial-match progress on the chunk_name compare, and stays blocked (resolved=0/10, blocked=10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile writes the chunk_name == png_sPLT operand pair into a CMP_MAP keyed by Hamming/prefix-distance bucket; an input whose chunk_name is closer to the sPLT FOURCC than before adds a new bucket and is retained as corpus, giving a hill-climbing gradient toward the exact 4-byte constant that naive's edge-only feedback cannot follow.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is an equality comparison of chunk_name against the sPLT chunk constant.
The cmplog winner resolves the true side and dispatches the sPLT handler at line 230.
The winner takes the true branch at line 229 while the loser never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: T=48 F=138  T=0 F=23  else if (chunk_name == png_sPLT)

evidence_trail.claim: The winner emits sPLT FOURCC bytes (s/P/L/T) at chunk-name offsets that the loser lacks.
cmplog is the decisive winner over naive with the technique delta being I2S.
cmplog adds I2SRandReplace which substitutes one logged CMP operand at offsets matching the other operand.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: naive seeds keep the chunk name at non-sPLT values and stay blocked.
value_profile is the decisive winner over naive with the technique delta being value_profile.
value_profile resolves all 10 trials but takes longer than cmplog, consistent with gradient climbing.
value_profile retains inputs whose CMP operands are closer to matching, giving a distance gradient.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3890 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 064b6b512c9b84b1` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 5 of the 6-level ancestor chain; the tool reported '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 5', a lower-bound signal of an I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the exact 4-byte sPLT equality gate where naive resolves the true branch as fast as cmplog/value_profile, showing the FOURCC equality is brute-forceable without CMP introspection.

weakest_evidence_point: The value_profile gradient claim is inferred from the duration gap and CMP_MAP mechanism description rather than from per-bucket distance evidence in the prompt.
